# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_svc_mdisk (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The MDisk name.
- `state` (String) Creates (`present`) or removes (`absent`) the MDisk.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `drive` (String) Drive(s) to use as members of the RAID array. Required when *state=present*, to create an MDisk array.
- `driveclass` (String) Specifies the class that is being used to create the array. Applies when *state=present*.
- `drivecount` (String) Specifies the number of the drives. The value must be a number in the range 2 - 128. Applies when *state=present*.
- `encrypt` (String) Defines use of encryption with the MDisk group. Applies when *state=present*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `level` (String) Specifies the RAID level. Required when *state=present*, to create an MDisk array.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `mdiskgrp` (String) The storage pool (mdiskgrp) to which you want to add the MDisk.
- `old_name` (String) Specifies the old name of an existing pool. Applies when *state=present*, to rename the existing pool.
- `password` (String) REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `stripewidth` (String) Specifies the width of a single unit of redundancy within a distributed set of drives The value must be a number in the range 2 - 16. Applies when *state=present*.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tier` (String) Specifies the new tier of the MDisk.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `token` (String) The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validates certification.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
